teams.blurb: Duke finished the regular season with a 32-2 record and secured the top overall seed in the East Region. They rank first in KenPom. However, their margin for error has evaporated due to foot injuries to point guard Caleb Foster and big man Patrick Ngongba II. Fits the ideal AI Intellipick profile for a deep run.
teams.strengths: Most efficient offense in the country, anchored by generational talent Cameron Boozer.
teams.weaknesses: Depleted backcourt depth and compromised frontcourt rotation due to injuries.

teams.weaknesses: Utterly atrocious on the offensive glass, ranking 356th nationally.

teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 49th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 101.8.
teams.blurb: The McNeese Cowboys secured a No. 12 seed in the South Region.

teams.name: Nebraska Cornhuskers
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 55th with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 118.5, utilizing a free-flowing perimeter attack.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 7th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 92.4.
teams.recentMomentum: Posted a 26-6 record but enters the tournament reeling after a loss to Purdue.
teams.blurb: Nebraska is searching for the first NCAA Tournament victory in program history.
teams.strengths: Highly disciplined defense and strong statistical balance.
teams.weaknesses: Struggles with offensive rebounding; struggles to draw fouls.

teams.name: Troy Trojans
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 141st with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 110.7.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 166th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 109.
teams.blurb: Troy qualified for the tournament for the second consecutive year, looking for their first-ever tournament win.

teams.name: North Carolina Tar Heels
teams.offenseEfficiency: Offensive efficiency metrics drop drastically without Caleb Wilson. Ranks 32nd with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 121.4.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Compromised interior defense. Ranks 37th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 100.5.

injuries.detail: Season-ending thumb fracture. (9 Pts/5 Reb/2 Ast)

keyPlayers.name: Henri Veesaar
keyPlayers.note: Forced to shoulder an unsustainable rebounding burden.

teams.blurb: North Carolina has one of the best wins of any team, handing Duke one of its two losses, but the loss of Caleb Wilson severely limits their ceiling.
teams.strengths: Traditional blue-blood pedigree.
teams.weaknesses: Compromised interior defense and missing frontcourt depth without Caleb Wilson.

teams.name: VCU Rams
teams.offenseEfficiency: High-volume three-point shooting attack. Ranks 46th with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 119.9.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Relentless ball pressure designed to disrupt half-court sets and force live-ball turnovers. Ranks 60th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 102.7.
teams.recentMomentum: Entering as the Atlantic-10 champions, having won 16 of their last 17 games.
teams.blurb: VCU is an 11-seed with a 27-7 record, having won 16 of their last 17 games to win the A-10.
teams.strengths: Relentless ball pressure designed to disrupt half-court sets and force live-ball turnovers.

teams.name: Illinois Fighting Illini
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 2nd with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 131.2.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 28th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 99.1.
teams.recentMomentum: Blew a 15-point lead and lost in overtime to Wisconsin in the Big Ten Tournament.
teams.blurb: Illinois possesses a highly productive attack but enters the tournament stinging from a blown 15-point lead in an overtime loss to Wisconsin. Viewed as a Fringe AI Intellipick.
teams.strengths: Unprecedented offensive efficiency; elite at mismatch hunting.
teams.weaknesses: Severe defensive lapses against skilled guards; struggles in late-game execution.

teams.name: Penn Quakers
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 204th with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 107.4.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 111th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 105.9.
teams.recentMomentum: Won the Ivy League tournament in an overtime thriller.
teams.blurb: Penn arrives hot off an overtime thriller to win the Ivy League tournament under first-year coach Fran McCaffery.

teams.name: Saint Mary's Gaels
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 43rd with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 120.3.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Play a slow, defensive slog. Ranks 19th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 97.2.
teams.blurb: Coach Randy Bennett has led the Gaels to 11 NCAA appearances over 25 years, but has never won a Sweet 16 game. Viewed as a Fringe AI Intellipick due to their heavily slowed pace.

teams.name: Texas A&M Aggies
teams.offenseEfficiency: Pushes a fast track meet. Ranks 49th with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 119.7.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 41st with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 101.
teams.blurb: Texas A&M pushes a fast track meet, setting up a massive stylistic clash against Saint Mary's.

teams.name: Houston Cougars
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 14th with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 124.9, executing a slow, methodical pace.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 5th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 91.4.
teams.recentMomentum: Lost to Arizona in the Big 12 championship game.
teams.blurb: This is the first time Houston hasn't earned a 1-seed since 2022. Characterized by the Slowest Pace metric.
teams.strengths: Suffocating defense and elite ball security.
teams.weaknesses: Heavy reliance on freshmen in key backcourt roles.

teams.name: Idaho Vandals
teams.offenseEfficiency: Ranks 176th with a KenPom offensive efficiency of 108.8.
teams.defenseEfficiency: Ranks 136th with a KenPom defensive efficiency of 107.3.
teams.blurb: Idaho is making its first NCAA Tournament appearance since 1990.
